---
title: "Sacrifice Law Findings"
---

## Current Support Findings

| case_id | status | support_rating | support_score | support_rating_path |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| lincoln | draft-scored | moderate support | 2.13 | cases/lincoln/analysis/support-ratings.json |
| hitler | pending-case-level-support-rating | pending |  |  |
| napoleon | pending-case-level-support-rating | pending |  |  |
| am-rev | pending-case-level-support-rating | pending |  |  |

Only Lincoln currently has a draft case-level support rating. Other cases remain
pending until their annotation, corroboration, and support-rating artifacts are
complete.
